name: Nutty Rice Pudding (India)
recipeIngredient: Chopped Nuts (such as walnuts, pistachios, almonds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 teaspoon butter in a cooking dish and fry the rice until it is pale golden brown. Use Basmati rice for best results, but any rice will work.
2. Once the rice is fried, add milk and cook together. This process takes about 30 minutes. Stir occasionally to prevent burning; a double-broiler can help if needed.
3. After the rice becomes soft, add the sweetened condensed milk and continue cooking for another 7-10 minutes, stirring constantly until the pudding reaches your desired consistency.
4. Turn off the heat and serve garnished with nuts, cardamom powder, and raisins. The pudding can also be chilled and served cold.
Notes:
If you prefer a sweeter pudding, add a couple of teaspoons of sugar after adding the condensed milk. For less fat, use skimmed milk instead of full-fat milk. Adjust the amount of rice to suit your taste and preference.
